title: tephroseris fuscata
intro: Tephroseris fuscata, also known as the rusty cineraria, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tephroseris fuscata include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
